occurrence_sentence: Today the U.S. Department of Energy's Fermi National Accelerator Laboratory announced the launch of the Fermilab Quantum Institute, which will bring all of the lab's quantum science projects under one umbrella.

Today the U.S. Department of Energy's Fermi National Accelerator Laboratory announced the launch of the Fermilab Quantum Institute, which will bring all of the lab's quantum science projects under one umbrella.

interaction_phrase: head of the Fermilab Quantum Institute
occurrence_sentence: "It's exactly that expertise that uniquely positions Fermilab to be a leader in the quantum science field," said Joseph Lykken, Fermilab's deputy director for research and head of the Fermilab Quantum Institute.

interaction_phrase: head of the Fermilab Quantum Institute
occurrence_sentence: "It's exactly that expertise that uniquely positions Fermilab to be a leader in the quantum science field," said Joseph Lykken, Fermilab's deputy director for research and head of the Fermilab Quantum Institute.
The Fermilab Quantum Institute will enable the laboratory to bring all of its quantum projects together and to attract new people and new ideas.
The Fermilab Quantum Institute will enable the laboratory to bring all of its quantum projects together and to attract new people and new ideas.
Fermilab is America's premier national laboratory for particle physics and accelerator research.
